name: CyberPPT
description_en: Turn documents, research reports, and raw data into high-density, editable, consulting-style PPTX decks built on an auditable evidence chain, SCR logic, and strict render/QA gates.
description_zh: 把文档、研究报告与原始数据转成高密度、可编辑的咨询式 PPTX——以可追溯证据链、SCR 论证与严格的渲染/质检门为基础。
long_en: Runs a three-stage gated workflow—MBB-style evidence table plus SCR storyline, then per-page ImageGen visual blueprints across 8 fixed styles, then a hybrid rebuild that keeps complex visuals faithful while core text stays editable—with structural, visual, editability, and overflow QA blocking delivery.
long_zh: 三阶段确认门流程：先做 MBB 级证据表与 SCR 故事线，再按 8 种固定风格逐页生成 ImageGen 视觉蓝图,最后用「复杂视觉保真 + 核心文字可编辑」的混合策略还原 PPTX；结构、视觉、可编辑性与溢出质检未过则阻断交付。
sec_note_en: Runs Python locally (python-pptx plus rendering subprocesses) and relies on the host's image-generation tool for per-page visual blueprints, sending your slide content to that model.
sec_note_zh: 在本地运行 Python(python-pptx 及渲染子进程),并依赖宿主的图像生成工具产出逐页视觉蓝图,会把幻灯片内容发送给该模型。
